name: Yogurt Banambrosia
recipeIngredient: Eating orange, peeled and seeded in chunks (1)
Canned unsweetened crushed pineapple, well drained (1 cup)
Seedless green grapes, sliced in half (1 cup)
Low-fat vanilla yogurt or low-fat plain yogurt (1 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine banana and apple in a bowl.
2. Cut the orange over the bowl to catch any juice.
3. Add orange chunks; stir well. The juice will delay browning of the apple and banana.
4. Stir in pineapple, grapes, and yogurt until combined.
5. Chill at least 1 hour before serving.
Six servings, each containing approximately 115 calories (105 calories with plain yogurt).
